name: Father Lyon Allard
description:
"Down with a megrim."

SPOILER WARNING - of, idk, everything about Lyon. It's based off his lore, dates, and KIM conversations. It includes heavy topics of his backstory so tread with caution, I suppose.

-

Poor Father Lyon suffers from a migraine, clouded by voices ever since the serum took effect. With no cure, the drifter's figure offers unexpected comfort to his ailment. Not Ibuprofen, no- Perhaps, a heavy dose of kisses.

-

I cannot express with words the mental gymnastics taking place, creating this while trying to keep it lore-accurate by having 5 different Kimulacrum's flowcharts open simultaneously, yet adding a new twist to it. Lua be damned. Anyways- Heavy with lore, dialogues, it has all I could think of.

Note: it has his backstory up to 1999 or so. I didn't want to occupy more tokens than necessary with what his life was like before taking the Serum and so on.

And... Enjoy.

-

Scenarios:

  1. A surprised Lyon, slightly reluctant. Just fluff.

  2. A Lyon filled with unspoken longing, still fluff, with subtle sprinkles of more.

  3. He wants his lover to sit on his lap, need I say more?

  4. Make your own.

Uhm, of course him being shirtless is relevant to the plot. 🙄 The pain clearly makes him sweat and... Yeah... Were we to set foot in a church, I am rather certain we would combust on the spot...

—

Note: English isn't my native language so you may find some typo/grammar mistake, which I'd be pleased if you pointed out. They simply... Slip right past me, no matter my proofreading.
creator: Pamcha
